message:
fix(vfs): support SHM region resizing and enforce extend flag

Unix VFS: shm_map now handles region growth by creating a replacement
region, copying existing data, and resizing the backing file when an
existing region is smaller than requested. Also properly checks the
extend flag before growing.

Windows VFS: adds missing extend flag check before resizing.

Also includes:
- B-tree BE-tree: fix borrow checker issue by extracting split data
  before inserting into node children
- Minor formatting in S3-FIFO cache and WAL checksum

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
